reasoning: Stub critic (autonomous run, 2026-05-31): Phase B Task B5 ships NATS lifecycle events for every wizard FSM transition. Three new event types (wizard.step.transitioning|completed|failed) added to @chiefaia/events-taxonomy-internal's registry.yaml + TS surface (EventType union, EVENT_SEVERITY, payload interfaces). A new apps/wizard/lib/wizard/fsm-events.ts module exposes withFsmPublish(opts, fn) — a fire-and-forget wrapper around StateMachine.transition() that publishes the three events at start/success/error boundaries. Both wizard PATCH routes that call sm.transition() are wrapped: /api/wizard/[projectId]/state and /api/wizard/interview/complete. Publisher is the same HybridEventBus singleton (@chiefaia/event-bus-nats) that already routes tenant.provisioned; the HybridEventBus's BUS_BACKEND_NATS_FOR_EVENT_TYPES env flag governs NATS vs legacy fallthrough so this PR is safe to merge with the flag off. trace_id propagation reads @opentelemetry/api's active span (set by @chiefaia/tracing's initTracing) and degrades to null when no SDK is initialised. 23 new vitest cases cover registry shape, TS taxonomy surface, the withFsmPublish contract (pre/post/error ordering, idempotent double-fire, fire-and-forget on publish failure, payload schema match, real wizard-step integration). All 235 wizard tests + 211 state-machine tests + 135 event-bus-nats tests pass. Reuse-first: no raw nats client, no parallel FSM, no new bus backend. Subscription-only LLM discipline: this PR adds no LLM calls. Operator should run live submitPlan against @caia/ea-architect before True-Zero admin-merge.
requested_modifications: Operator: run live submitPlan against @caia/ea-architect before True-Zero admin-merge.

Operator: flip BUS_BACKEND_NATS_FOR_EVENT_TYPES to include wizard.step.* once a subscriber is online.
